exampleSentences.chinese: 古籍中以㑇字形容人之聪慧。
exampleSentences.english: In ancient texts, the character 㑇 was used to describe a person's cleverness.

exampleSentences.chinese: 㑇为罕见古字，今已少用。
exampleSentences.english: 㑇 is a rare archaic character seldom used today.

exampleSentences.chinese: 学者研究㑇字的历史渊源。
exampleSentences.english: Scholars study the historical origins of the character 㑇.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她在大学主修人文学专业。
exampleSentences.english: She majored in humanities at university.

exampleSentences.chinese: 人文学培养批判性思维能力。
exampleSentences.english: The humanities cultivate critical thinking skills.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the value of humanities education

exampleSentences.chinese: 人文学与理工科同样重要。
exampleSentences.english: The humanities are just as important as science and engineering.

exampleSentences.chinese: 仁化县位于广东韶关市境内。
exampleSentences.english: Renhua County is located within Shaoguan City, Guangdong.

exampleSentences.chinese: 仁化县以丹霞山风景著名。
exampleSentences.english: Renhua County is famous for the Danxia Mountain scenery.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的老家就在仁化县农村。
exampleSentences.english: His hometown is in the rural areas of Renhua County.

exampleSentences.chinese: 伦敦是英国的首都城市。
exampleSentences.english: London is the capital city of the United Kingdom.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她计划明年去伦敦留学。
exampleSentences.english: She plans to go to London to study abroad next year.

exampleSentences.chinese: 伦敦的博物馆大多免费参观。
exampleSentences.english: Most museums in London are free to visit.

exampleSentences.chinese: 佛教在中国有悠久的历史。
exampleSentences.english: Buddhism has a long history in China.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她信仰佛教，每天打坐冥想。
exampleSentences.english: She follows Buddhism and meditates every day.

exampleSentences.chinese: 佛教强调慈悲与内心平静。
exampleSentences.english: Buddhism emphasizes compassion and inner peace.

exampleSentences.chinese: 该系统采用先进的信令协议。
exampleSentences.english: The system uses an advanced signaling protocol.

exampleSentences.chinese: 信令故障导致通话中断。
exampleSentences.english: A signaling failure caused the call to be disconnected.

exampleSentences.chinese: 工程师正在调试网络信令系统。
exampleSentences.english: The engineer is debugging the network signaling system.

exampleSentences.chinese: 在公园里偶见多年不见的老友。
exampleSentences.english: I happened upon an old friend I hadn't seen for years in the park.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这种鸟在本地偶见，十分珍稀。
exampleSentences.english: This bird is occasionally spotted locally and is quite rare.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing rarity of a wildlife sighting

exampleSentences.chinese: 翻阅旧书时偶见一张老照片。
exampleSentences.english: While flipping through an old book, I happened upon an old photograph.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他傻里傻气的样子让人忍俊不禁。
exampleSentences.english: His foolish manner made people unable to hold back laughter.

exampleSentences.chinese: 别傻里傻气的，快想想办法！
exampleSentences.english: Stop being so foolish and think of a solution!
exampleSentences.usage: Urging someone to be more sensible

exampleSentences.chinese: 她傻里傻气地笑着，毫不在意。
exampleSentences.english: She laughed in her silly way, not caring at all.

exampleSentences.chinese: 全南县隶属江西省赣州市管辖。
exampleSentences.english: Quannan County is under the jurisdiction of Ganzhou City, Jiangxi Province.

exampleSentences.chinese: 全南县的脐橙远近闻名。
exampleSentences.english: The navel oranges of Quannan County are well known far and wide.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他在全南县投资建设了工厂。
exampleSentences.english: He invested in building a factory in Quannan County.

exampleSentences.chinese: 全新纪始于约一万两千年前。
exampleSentences.english: The Holocene Epoch began approximately 12,000 years ago.

exampleSentences.chinese: 人类文明主要发展于全新纪时期。
exampleSentences.english: Human civilization developed mainly during the Holocene Epoch.

exampleSentences.chinese: 地质学家研究全新纪的气候变化。
exampleSentences.english: Geologists study climate changes during the Holocene Epoch.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他能判别真假古董。
exampleSentences.english: He can differentiate between genuine and fake antiques.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这两种植物难以判别。
exampleSentences.english: These two plants are difficult to differentiate.

exampleSentences.chinese: 专家帮我们判别了方向。
exampleSentences.english: The expert helped us determine the direction.

exampleSentences.chinese: 利老师今天没来上课。
exampleSentences.english: Teacher Li didn't come to class today.

exampleSentences.chinese: 利先生是公司的创始人。
exampleSentences.english: Mr. Li is the founder of the company.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这位利女士很有名望。
exampleSentences.english: This Ms. Li is very well-respected.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这把刀刃非常利。
exampleSentences.english: The blade of this knife is extremely sharp.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的目光犀利如刀。
exampleSentences.english: His gaze is as sharp as a knife.

exampleSentences.chinese: 工欲善其事，必先利其器。
exampleSentences.english: A worker must sharpen his tools before he can do his work well.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他为国家立下了功勋。
exampleSentences.english: He established great achievements for the country.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这位将军功勋卓著。
exampleSentences.english: This general has outstanding achievements.

exampleSentences.chinese: 功勋艺术家受到表彰。
exampleSentences.english: The meritorious artist was commended.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他是华裔加拿大人。
exampleSentences.english: He is a Canadian of Chinese descent.

exampleSentences.chinese: 中华文化源远流长。
exampleSentences.english: Chinese culture has a long and profound history.

exampleSentences.chinese: 华人遍布世界各地。
exampleSentences.english: Chinese people are spread all over the world.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to the global Chinese community

exampleSentences.chinese: 华山是五岳之一。
exampleSentences.english: Mount Hua is one of the Five Sacred Mountains.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他攀登华山花了一天。
exampleSentences.english: It took him a day to climb Mount Hua.

exampleSentences.chinese: 华山的险峻令人叹为观止。
exampleSentences.english: The precipitousness of Mount Hua is breathtaking.

exampleSentences.chinese: 春华秋实，岁月流转。
exampleSentences.english: Spring blossoms and autumn fruits — time flows on.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古诗中常以华代花。
exampleSentences.english: In ancient poetry, 华 is often used in place of 花.

exampleSentences.chinese: 落华满地无人扫。
exampleSentences.english: Fallen blossoms cover the ground with no one to sweep them.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这座宫殿富丽堂皇。
exampleSentences.english: This palace is magnificent and splendid.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她穿着华美的礼服出席。
exampleSentences.english: She attended wearing a magnificent gown.

exampleSentences.chinese: 繁华的都市令他着迷。
exampleSentences.english: The magnificent city fascinated him.

exampleSentences.chinese: 敌军占据了山顶阵地。
exampleSentences.english: The enemy troops occupied the hilltop position.

exampleSentences.chinese: 工作占据了他大部分时间。
exampleSentences.english: Work takes up most of his time.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这家店占据了最好的位置。
exampleSentences.english: This store holds the best location.

exampleSentences.chinese: 原平市位于山西省。
exampleSentences.english: Yuanping City is located in Shanxi Province.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他老家在原平市。
exampleSentences.english: His hometown is in Yuanping City.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to one's place of origin

exampleSentences.chinese: 原平的农产品很有名。
exampleSentences.english: Yuanping's agricultural products are well-known.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他是我多年的同行。
exampleSentences.english: He is a colleague in the same profession as me for many years.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to someone in the same industry

exampleSentences.chinese: 同行之间竞争很激烈。
exampleSentences.english: Competition among peers in the same trade is fierce.

exampleSentences.chinese: 遇到同行，互相交流经验。
exampleSentences.english: When meeting someone in the same field, they exchange experiences.

exampleSentences.chinese: 我们一起同行去北京。
exampleSentences.english: We traveled together to Beijing.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他邀请朋友同行出游。
exampleSentences.english: He invited friends to journey with him on a trip.

exampleSentences.chinese: 两人同行，路上不寂寞。
exampleSentences.english: Traveling together, the road doesn't feel lonely.

exampleSentences.chinese: 和平县位于广东省河源市。
exampleSentences.english: Heping County is located in Heyuan City, Guangdong Province.

exampleSentences.chinese: 和平县以自然风光著称。
exampleSentences.english: Heping County is known for its natural scenery.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的老家在和平县农村。
exampleSentences.english: His hometown is in the rural area of Heping County.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to someone's place of origin

exampleSentences.chinese: 这炸鸡吃起来咔啦咔啦的。
exampleSentences.english: This fried chicken is super crispy when you eat it.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the crunchy texture of fried food

exampleSentences.chinese: 咔啦鸡是孩子最爱的零食。
exampleSentences.english: Crispy fried chicken is the kids' favorite snack.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to a popular crispy fried food

exampleSentences.chinese: 外皮咔啦，里面嫩滑多汁。
exampleSentences.english: The outside is crispy, while the inside is tender and juicy.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the texture contrast of fried food

exampleSentences.chinese: 巢中雏鸟嗷嗷待哺。
exampleSentences.english: The chicks in the nest cry out pitifully waiting to be fed.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing baby birds waiting for food

exampleSentences.chinese: 家中老小嗷嗷待哺，他压力很大。
exampleSentences.english: With the whole family depending on him for food, he is under great pressure.

exampleSentences.chinese: 灾区难民嗷嗷待哺，急需救援。
exampleSentences.english: Disaster victims are desperately waiting for food and urgently need relief.

exampleSentences.chinese: 门嘎的一声打开了。
exampleSentences.english: The door opened with a sharp creaking sound.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a sudden loud short sound from a door

exampleSentences.chinese: 车子嘎一声急刹停下。
exampleSentences.english: The car stopped abruptly with a sharp screeching sound.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the sound of sudden braking

exampleSentences.chinese: 嘎的一声，树枝断了。
exampleSentences.english: With a sharp crack, the branch snapped.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the sound of something breaking

exampleSentences.chinese: 鸭子嘎嘎叫着跑过来。
exampleSentences.english: The duck came running over with a cackling quack.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the sound a duck makes

exampleSentences.chinese: 院子里传来嘎嘎的笑声。
exampleSentences.english: Cackling laughter came from the courtyard.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她嘎嘎大笑，十分开心。
exampleSentences.english: She laughed with a loud cackle, very happy.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这老头脾气嘎，不好惹。
exampleSentences.english: This old man has a bad temper and is hard to deal with.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing someone's ornery disposition in dialect

exampleSentences.chinese: 他从小就嘎，谁也管不了。
exampleSentences.english: He has been ill-tempered since childhood, and nobody can control him.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a stubborn and difficult personality

exampleSentences.chinese: 那孩子真嘎，老跟人闹别扭。
exampleSentences.english: That kid is really ornery, always picking fights with others.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a difficult child in dialect context

exampleSentences.chinese: 古籍中此字为嘎的旧写法。
exampleSentences.english: In ancient texts, this character is an old variant form of 嘎.
exampleSentences.usage: Academic reference to the archaic variant

exampleSentences.english: This character is rarely seen now; 嘎 is used in its place.
exampleSentences.usage: Noting the replacement of the old variant

exampleSentences.chinese: 学者研究此字的历史演变。
exampleSentences.english: Scholars study the historical evolution of this character.

exampleSentences.chinese: 国土安全局负责保护美国边境。
exampleSentences.english: The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for protecting US borders.

exampleSentences.english: The Department of Homeland Security has strengthened airport security checks.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他在国土安全局担任要职。
exampleSentences.english: He holds an important position at the Department of Homeland Security.

exampleSentences.chinese: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的地标。
exampleSentences.english: The Eiffel Tower is a landmark of Paris.

exampleSentences.english: This bridge has become the city's new landmark.

exampleSentences.chinese: 地标建筑吸引了大批游客。
exampleSentences.english: Landmark buildings attract large numbers of tourists.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他真是好了疮疤忘了痛，又犯同样的错。
exampleSentences.english: He truly forgot the pain once the wound healed and made the same mistake again.
exampleSentences.usage: criticizing someone who repeats past mistakes

exampleSentences.english: Don't forget the pain once the wound heals — learn from your lessons.
exampleSentences.usage: warning someone not to repeat past errors

exampleSentences.chinese: 好了疮疤忘了痛，这毛病得改。
exampleSentences.english: Forgetting pain once healed is a bad habit that needs to change.
exampleSentences.usage: commenting on a person's tendency to ignore past suffering

exampleSentences.chinese: 战争让无数家庭妻离子散。
exampleSentences.english: War caused countless families to be torn apart.
exampleSentences.usage: describing the devastating effects of war on families

exampleSentences.chinese: 洪灾过后，许多人妻离子散。
exampleSentences.english: After the flood, many people were separated from their families.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的赌博恶习导致妻离子散。
exampleSentences.english: His gambling addiction led to his family being torn apart.
exampleSentences.usage: describing consequences of destructive personal behavior

exampleSentences.chinese: 嬿字常用于女子名中。
exampleSentences.english: The character 嬿 is often used in women's names.
exampleSentences.usage: explaining the usage of the character in naming

exampleSentences.chinese: 她名字中有个嬿字，十分雅致。
exampleSentences.english: Her name contains the character 嬿, which is very elegant.

exampleSentences.chinese: 嬿字形容女子温婉可人。
exampleSentences.english: The character 嬿 describes a woman who is gentle and lovely.
exampleSentences.usage: explaining the meaning of the character

exampleSentences.chinese: 客家人遍布世界各地。
exampleSentences.english: Hakka people are spread all over the world.

exampleSentences.english: Hakka people have a unique language and culture.

exampleSentences.english: He is a Hakka person from Meizhou, Guangdong.

exampleSentences.english: He quoted passages from the Sermon on the Mount.

exampleSentences.english: She pulled the curtain to block out the sunlight.

exampleSentences.english: Ancient beds were often surrounded by curtains.

exampleSentences.english: The match ended with both sides evenly matched.

exampleSentences.english: All six faces of a parallelepiped are parallelograms.

exampleSentences.english: You should slow down when going through a curve.

exampleSentences.english: The racing driver overtook his opponent on the bend.

exampleSentences.chinese: 山路弯道多，驾驶需小心。
exampleSentences.english: Mountain roads have many curves, so drive carefully.

exampleSentences.english: Researchers are studying how to overcome drug resistance.

exampleSentences.english: The police are screening through the list of suspects.

exampleSentences.english: Workers conducted a safety inspection of the equipment.

exampleSentences.chinese: 疫情期间对密接者逐一排查。
exampleSentences.english: During the epidemic, close contacts were screened one by one.

exampleSentences.chinese: 政治部负责部队思想教育工作。
exampleSentences.english: The political division is responsible for ideological education in the troops.

exampleSentences.english: The political division issued new disciplinary regulations.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他是我父亲的旁系亲属。
exampleSentences.english: He is a collateral relative of my father.

exampleSentences.english: Collateral relatives are not within the scope of direct inheritance.

exampleSentences.chinese: 族谱上记载了旁系各支的信息。
exampleSentences.english: The genealogy records information about all collateral branches.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他时运不济，屡次失败。
exampleSentences.english: Fate was unfavorable to him, and he failed repeatedly.

exampleSentences.english: With the omens unfavorable, the plan had to be shelved.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她感叹自己时运不济，怀才不遇。
exampleSentences.english: She lamented her ill fate and unrecognized talent.

exampleSentences.chinese: 普陀山是观音菩萨的道场。
exampleSentences.english: Mt. Putuo is the sacred bodhimanda of Guanyin Bodhisattva.

exampleSentences.chinese: 每年许多信徒前往普陀山朝圣。
exampleSentences.english: Every year many devotees make pilgrimages to Mt. Putuo.

exampleSentences.chinese: 普陀山风景秀丽，香火旺盛。
exampleSentences.english: Mt. Putuo is scenic and has thriving incense offerings.

exampleSentences.english: Extremism threatens social stability.

exampleSentences.english: The government cracks down hard on extremism.

exampleSentences.english: Education is a weapon against extremism.

exampleSentences.chinese: 桃园市有台湾最大的机场。
exampleSentences.english: Taoyuan City has Taiwan's largest airport.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他从桃园市搬到了台北。
exampleSentences.english: He moved from Taoyuan City to Taipei.

exampleSentences.chinese: 桃园市的经济发展很迅速。
exampleSentences.english: Taoyuan City's economy is developing rapidly.

exampleSentences.chinese: 正统帝曾被瓦剌俘虏。
exampleSentences.english: The Zhengtong Emperor was once captured by the Oirats.

exampleSentences.chinese: 正统年间发生了土木之变。
exampleSentences.english: The Tumu Crisis occurred during the Zhengtong reign.

exampleSentences.chinese: 正统帝后来复辟称英宗。
exampleSentences.english: The Zhengtong Emperor later reclaimed the throne and was known as Yingzong.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他坚持正统的儒家思想。
exampleSentences.english: He adheres to orthodox Confucian thought.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这家店做的是正统川菜。
exampleSentences.english: This restaurant serves authentic Sichuan cuisine.

exampleSentences.chinese: 正统观念在现代受到挑战。
exampleSentences.english: Orthodox views are being challenged in modern times.

exampleSentences.chinese: 两部影片将进行汇映活动。
exampleSentences.english: The two films will hold a joint screening event.

exampleSentences.chinese: 本次汇映吸引了大批影迷。
exampleSentences.english: This joint screening attracted a large number of fans.

exampleSentences.chinese: 汇映活动在影院顺利举行。
exampleSentences.english: The joint screening event was held smoothly at the cinema.

exampleSentences.chinese: 汇映是匯映的简化写法。
exampleSentences.english: 汇映 is the simplified form of 匯映.

exampleSentences.chinese: 两种写法意思完全相同。
exampleSentences.english: Both forms have exactly the same meaning.

exampleSentences.chinese: 大陆地区常用汇映这写法。
exampleSentences.english: The form 汇映 is commonly used in mainland China.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她每天早上都认真洗脸。
exampleSentences.english: She washes her face carefully every morning.

exampleSentences.chinese: 洗脸后记得涂上护肤品。
exampleSentences.english: Remember to apply skincare products after washing your face.

exampleSentences.chinese: 用冷水洗脸能让人清醒。
exampleSentences.english: Washing your face with cold water can wake you up.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这道菜的滋味真是难忘。
exampleSentences.english: The taste of this dish is truly unforgettable.

exampleSentences.chinese: 失恋的滋味不好受。
exampleSentences.english: The feeling of a broken heart is hard to bear.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她细细品味着茶的滋味。
exampleSentences.english: She savored the taste of the tea slowly.

exampleSentences.chinese: 妈妈做的炸丸子外酥里嫩。
exampleSentences.english: Mom's fried meatballs are crispy outside and tender inside.

exampleSentences.chinese: 过年时家家都会炸丸子。
exampleSentences.english: Every family makes fried meatballs during the New Year.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他一口气吃了五个炸丸子。
exampleSentences.english: He ate five fried meatballs in one go.

exampleSentences.chinese: 火锅里的牛百叶很爽脆。
exampleSentences.english: The omasum in hotpot is very crispy and refreshing.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他点了一份牛百叶凉拌菜。
exampleSentences.english: He ordered a cold dish of omasum.

exampleSentences.chinese: 牛百叶涮火锅只需几秒钟。
exampleSentences.english: Omasum only needs a few seconds to cook in hotpot.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她是典型的狮子座，热情又自信。
exampleSentences.english: She is a typical Leo — passionate and confident.

exampleSentences.chinese: 狮子座的守护星是太阳。
exampleSentences.english: Leo's ruling celestial body is the Sun.

exampleSentences.chinese: 我男友是狮子座，很有领导力。
exampleSentences.english: My boyfriend is a Leo and very leadership-oriented.

exampleSentences.chinese: 博物馆展出了一件青铜瓿。
exampleSentences.english: The museum displayed a bronze bù vessel.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这件瓿出土于商代遗址。
exampleSentences.english: This bù was unearthed from a Shang dynasty site.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古人用瓿盛酒或水。
exampleSentences.english: Ancient people used bù vessels to hold wine or water.
exampleSentences.usage: Explaining historical use of the artifact

exampleSentences.chinese: 我给她寄了一张生日贺卡。
exampleSentences.english: I sent her a birthday card.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他亲手做了一张生日贺卡。
exampleSentences.english: He handmade a birthday card himself.

exampleSentences.chinese: 生日贺卡上写满了祝福语。
exampleSentences.english: The birthday card was filled with well-wishes.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the content of a birthday card

exampleSentences.chinese: 公司派员工对客户进行电访。
exampleSentences.english: The company sent employees to conduct phone interviews with clients.

exampleSentences.chinese: 我接到一通电访，询问满意度。
exampleSentences.english: I received a phone survey asking about my satisfaction.

exampleSentences.chinese: 电访结果将用于改善服务。
exampleSentences.english: The phone survey results will be used to improve services.
exampleSentences.usage: Explaining the purpose of telephone outreach

exampleSentences.chinese: 男人膝下有黄金，岂能随便下跪。
exampleSentences.english: A man has gold beneath his knees — he should not kneel lightly.
exampleSentences.usage: Expressing a man's dignity and pride

exampleSentences.chinese: 他常说男人膝下有黄金，绝不低头。
exampleSentences.english: He often said a man's knees are worth gold and he would never bow down.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing someone's strong sense of integrity

exampleSentences.chinese: 男人膝下有黄金，只跪天地父母。
exampleSentences.english: A man kneels only before heaven, earth, and his parents.
exampleSentences.usage: Traditional proverb usage in a moral context

exampleSentences.chinese: 两人相好多年，感情很深。
exampleSentences.english: The two have been intimate for many years and share a deep bond.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他们从小相好，青梅竹马。
exampleSentences.english: They were close since childhood, childhood sweethearts.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a childhood friendship turned romance

exampleSentences.chinese: 村里人都知道他俩相好。
exampleSentences.english: Everyone in the village knew the two were involved.

exampleSentences.chinese: 工头每天在工地上督工。
exampleSentences.english: The foreman oversees workers at the construction site every day.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他被派去督工，确保进度。
exampleSentences.english: He was assigned to supervise workers and ensure progress.

exampleSentences.chinese: 没人督工，工人们就懈怠了。
exampleSentences.english: Without anyone overseeing them, the workers slacked off.

exampleSentences.chinese: 冥王星被重新归类为矮行星。
exampleSentences.english: Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet.

exampleSentences.chinese: 太阳系中有多颗矮行星。
exampleSentences.english: There are multiple dwarf planets in the solar system.

exampleSentences.chinese: 矮行星的体积比行星小得多。
exampleSentences.english: Dwarf planets are much smaller in volume than full planets.
exampleSentences.usage: Explaining the definition of a dwarf planet

exampleSentences.chinese: 石河子是新疆的一座现代城市。
exampleSentences.english: Shihezi is a modern city in Xinjiang.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他在石河子大学读书。
exampleSentences.english: He studies at Shihezi University.
exampleSentences.usage: Mentioning an educational institution in the city

exampleSentences.chinese: 石河子以棉花生产闻名全国。
exampleSentences.english: Shihezi is nationally known for its cotton production.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她把饺子蘸料放在碟子里。
exampleSentences.english: She put the dumpling dipping sauce in a small saucer.

exampleSentences.chinese: 桌上摆了几个空碟子。
exampleSentences.english: Several empty saucers were placed on the table.

exampleSentences.chinese: 碟子太小，装不了多少菜。
exampleSentences.english: The saucer is too small to hold much food.
exampleSentences.usage: Commenting on the size of a dish

exampleSentences.chinese: 线段的两个端点已标出。
exampleSentences.english: The two endpoints of the line segment have been marked.

exampleSentences.chinese: 电缆的端点需要绝缘处理。
exampleSentences.english: The endpoint of the cable needs to be insulated.

exampleSentences.chinese: 找到路径的端点很重要。
exampleSentences.english: Finding the endpoint of the path is important.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他答应明天来帮忙。
exampleSentences.english: He agreed to come and help tomorrow.
exampleSentences.usage: 答应 - agreeing to a request

exampleSentences.chinese: 她不答理那个陌生人。
exampleSentences.english: She didn't bother responding to that stranger.

exampleSentences.chinese: 我叫他，他也不答应。
exampleSentences.english: I called out to him but he didn't respond.
exampleSentences.usage: 答应 - responding to being called

exampleSentences.chinese: 他答不上来这道题。
exampleSentences.english: He couldn't answer this question.

exampleSentences.chinese: 记者一一答了媒体的问题。
exampleSentences.english: The reporter answered the media's questions one by one.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她对此无言以答。
exampleSentences.english: She had nothing to say in response to this.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的文风十分简练。
exampleSentences.english: His writing style is very terse and concise.

exampleSentences.chinese: 发言要简练，别啰嗦。
exampleSentences.english: Keep your speech concise; don't ramble.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这篇报道语言简练有力。
exampleSentences.english: The language in this report is concise and powerful.

exampleSentences.chinese: 该粉末的粒径约为50纳米。
exampleSentences.english: The grain size of this powder is approximately 50 nanometers.

exampleSentences.chinese: 粒径越小，过滤效果越好。
exampleSentences.english: The smaller the grain size, the better the filtration effect.

exampleSentences.chinese: 实验需要测量颗粒的粒径。
exampleSentences.english: The experiment requires measuring the grain size of the particles.

exampleSentences.chinese: 教练赛前给队员做了精神训话。
exampleSentences.english: The coach gave the team a pep talk before the game.

exampleSentences.chinese: 经理的精神训话让大家充满干劲。
exampleSentences.english: The manager's pep talk filled everyone with motivation.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的精神训话让士气大振。
exampleSentences.english: His pep talk greatly boosted morale.

exampleSentences.chinese: 红腹灰雀的胸部呈鲜红色。
exampleSentences.english: The Eurasian bullfinch has a bright red breast.

exampleSentences.chinese: 我在林间看到一只红腹灰雀。
exampleSentences.english: I spotted a Eurasian bullfinch in the forest.

exampleSentences.chinese: 红腹灰雀常见于北方针叶林。
exampleSentences.english: The Eurasian bullfinch is commonly found in northern coniferous forests.

exampleSentences.chinese: 你去道个歉，结了！
exampleSentences.english: Just go apologize and that's that!

exampleSentences.chinese: 别想那么多，睡觉结了。
exampleSentences.english: Stop overthinking — just go to sleep, that will do.

exampleSentences.chinese: 签个字结了，别拖了。
exampleSentences.english: Just sign it and be done with it; stop dragging it out.

exampleSentences.chinese: 几位同学结伴而行去爬山。
exampleSentences.english: Several classmates went hiking together as a group.

exampleSentences.chinese: 夜晚出行最好结伴而行。
exampleSentences.english: It's best to travel in a group when going out at night.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他们结伴而行，一路有说有笑。
exampleSentences.english: They traveled together, chatting and laughing along the way.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他突然感到腹部一阵绞痛。
exampleSentences.english: He suddenly felt a sharp, twisting pain in his abdomen.

exampleSentences.chinese: 胃绞痛让她无法站立。
exampleSentences.english: The stomach cramps were so severe she couldn't stand.

exampleSentences.chinese: 心绞痛发作时需立即就医。
exampleSentences.english: When angina attacks, you must seek medical attention immediately.

exampleSentences.chinese: 以绳缳其颈而毙之
exampleSentences.english: He bound a rope around its neck and killed it.
exampleSentences.usage: Classical literary description of execution or binding

exampleSentences.chinese: 缳首之刑古已有之
exampleSentences.english: The punishment of hanging by the neck has existed since ancient times.

exampleSentences.chinese: 囚犯被缳缚于柱上
exampleSentences.english: The prisoner was bound to the post with rope.
exampleSentences.usage: Literary description of restraining a captive

exampleSentences.chinese: 他是我多年的至交
exampleSentences.english: He has been my closest friend for many years.

exampleSentences.chinese: 两人是莫逆至交
exampleSentences.english: The two of them are the closest of friends.
exampleSentences.usage: Emphasizing the depth of a friendship

exampleSentences.chinese: 至交难求，要好好珍惜
exampleSentences.english: True close friends are hard to find — cherish them well.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这件瓷器做工极致精美
exampleSentences.english: The craftsmanship of this porcelain is exquisitely fine.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the quality of an artisan object

exampleSentences.chinese: 她的妆容精致无可挑剔
exampleSentences.english: Her makeup is delicate and flawless.

exampleSentences.chinese: 布置得细致入微，令人叹服
exampleSentences.english: The arrangement was so delicate and meticulous that it was admirable.

exampleSentences.chinese: 请致以我诚挚的问候
exampleSentences.english: Please convey my sincere regards.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他致函表达谢意
exampleSentences.english: He sent a letter to express his gratitude.

exampleSentences.chinese: 大会主席致开幕词
exampleSentences.english: The chairman of the conference delivered the opening address.

exampleSentences.chinese: 泡完澡感觉浑身舒坦
exampleSentences.english: After a bath, my whole body felt comfortable and at ease.

exampleSentences.chinese: 说出来心里就舒坦多了
exampleSentences.english: Once I said it out loud, I felt much more at ease inside.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing emotional relief after expressing oneself

exampleSentences.chinese: 这张椅子坐着真舒坦
exampleSentences.english: This chair is really comfortable to sit in.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她刚买了最新款苹果手机
exampleSentences.english: She just bought the latest iPhone.
exampleSentences.usage: Casual mention of purchasing a new phone

exampleSentences.chinese: 苹果手机的镜头拍照很清晰
exampleSentences.english: The iPhone camera takes very clear photos.

exampleSentences.chinese: 苹果手机在中国很受欢迎
exampleSentences.english: iPhones are very popular in China.

exampleSentences.chinese: 莱斯沃斯岛位于爱琴海东部
exampleSentences.english: Lesbos Island is located in the eastern Aegean Sea.
exampleSentences.usage: Geographical description of the island's location

exampleSentences.chinese: 古代女诗人萨福生于莱斯沃斯岛
exampleSentences.english: The ancient poetess Sappho was born on the island of Lesbos.

exampleSentences.chinese: 莱斯沃斯岛是希腊著名旅游胜地
exampleSentences.english: Lesbos Island is a famous tourist destination in Greece.

exampleSentences.chinese: 薄暗时分，街灯渐渐亮起
exampleSentences.english: At dusk, the street lights gradually came on.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the transitional moment between day and night

exampleSentences.chinese: 薄暗中看不清对方的脸
exampleSentences.english: In the dim dusk light, I couldn't make out the other person's face.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他在薄暗里独自走回家
exampleSentences.english: He walked home alone in the fading dusk.

exampleSentences.chinese: 熊在冬天会蛰伏于洞中
exampleSentences.english: Bears hibernate in caves during winter.

exampleSentences.chinese: 惊蛰一到，万物复苏
exampleSentences.english: Once the Awakening of Insects arrives, all things revive.
exampleSentences.usage: Reference to the traditional Chinese solar term Jingzhe

exampleSentences.chinese: 他蛰居家中多年不出门
exampleSentences.english: He secluded himself at home for many years without going out.
exampleSentences.usage: Figurative use describing a person's reclusive lifestyle

exampleSentences.chinese: 这件丑事已街知巷闻
exampleSentences.english: This shameful matter has become known to everyone in the neighborhood.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing how a scandal has spread widely

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的善举街知巷闻，备受称赞
exampleSentences.english: His good deeds are known throughout the neighborhood and widely praised.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a positive reputation spreading through a community

exampleSentences.chinese: 那家小店的美食街知巷闻
exampleSentences.english: The delicious food at that little shop is known to everyone around.
exampleSentences.usage: Praising a local eatery's widespread reputation

exampleSentences.chinese: 古衣袪部宽而长。
exampleSentences.english: The sleeve opening of ancient garments was wide and long.

exampleSentences.chinese: 此袍袪口绣有花纹。
exampleSentences.english: The sleeve opening of this robe is embroidered with patterns.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing decorative details on traditional clothing

exampleSentences.chinese: 学者考证古代袪之形制。
exampleSentences.english: Scholars researched the form and structure of ancient sleeve openings.
exampleSentences.usage: Academic discussion of historical garment terminology

exampleSentences.chinese: 褀为古籍中罕见字。
exampleSentences.english: 褀 is a rarely seen character in ancient texts.
exampleSentences.usage: Academic reference to the character's rarity

exampleSentences.chinese: 此字乃綥之异体字。
exampleSentences.english: This character is a variant form of 綥.

exampleSentences.chinese: 学者整理古字时见褀字。
exampleSentences.english: Scholars encountered the character 褀 while compiling ancient scripts.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古人以襁穿铜钱携带。
exampleSentences.english: Ancient people used strings to thread copper coins for carrying.

exampleSentences.chinese: 市集上铜钱用襁串成串。
exampleSentences.english: At the market, copper coins were strung together with a cord.

exampleSentences.chinese: 典籍记载襁钱之用法。
exampleSentences.english: Classical texts record the usage of stringing coins with 襁.

exampleSentences.chinese: 母亲用襁将婴儿背在身上。
exampleSentences.english: The mother used a cloth carrier to carry the baby on her back.

exampleSentences.chinese: 婴儿裹于襁中安然入睡。
exampleSentences.english: The baby fell peacefully asleep wrapped in the carrying cloth.
exampleSentences.usage: Depicting a baby being carried and soothed

exampleSentences.chinese: 古时襁褓护婴御寒。
exampleSentences.english: In ancient times, the baby carrier cloth protected infants from the cold.

exampleSentences.chinese: 此人惯以諆术骗财。
exampleSentences.english: This person habitually uses deception to swindle money.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古文中諆字指欺诈之行。
exampleSentences.english: In classical texts, 諆 refers to acts of fraud and deception.
exampleSentences.usage: Academic explanation of classical character meaning

exampleSentences.chinese: 諆人者终将自食恶果。
exampleSentences.english: Those who deceive others will ultimately face the consequences.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他的记性真好，过目不忘。
exampleSentences.english: His memory is excellent — he never forgets what he reads.

exampleSentences.chinese: 年纪大了，记性越来越差。
exampleSentences.english: As one gets older, memory becomes worse and worse.

exampleSentences.chinese: 你记性不好就多做笔记。
exampleSentences.english: If your memory isn't great, take more notes.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古文以跂指人之足部。
exampleSentences.english: In classical texts, 跂 refers to the human foot.
exampleSentences.usage: Academic explanation of classical character meaning

exampleSentences.chinese: 此字义为足，见于古籍。
exampleSentences.english: This character meaning 'foot' appears in ancient books.

exampleSentences.chinese: 学者辨析跂字诸义项。
exampleSentences.english: Scholars analyzed the multiple meanings of the character 跂.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古籍载有人生而有跂。
exampleSentences.english: Ancient texts record that some people were born with a sixth toe.

exampleSentences.chinese: 庄子曾以跂喻多余之物。
exampleSentences.english: Zhuangzi used the extra toe as a metaphor for superfluous things.

exampleSentences.chinese: 跂者，足之赘生六趾也。
exampleSentences.english: 跂 refers to a sixth toe that grows as an extra digit on the foot.

exampleSentences.chinese: 孩童跂上墙头张望。
exampleSentences.english: The child climbed up onto the wall to look around.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a child climbing to get a better view

exampleSentences.chinese: 他跂树而上，摘取果实。
exampleSentences.english: He climbed up the tree to pick fruit.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the act of climbing a tree

exampleSentences.chinese: 古人跂高处以望远方。
exampleSentences.english: Ancient people climbed to high places to gaze into the distance.
exampleSentences.usage: Classical literary description of climbing for a view

exampleSentences.chinese: 她跂脚才能看到台上。
exampleSentences.english: She had to stand on tiptoe to see the stage.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing standing on tiptoe to improve sightline

exampleSentences.chinese: 孩子跂起脚尖够书架。
exampleSentences.english: The child stood on tiptoe to reach the bookshelf.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a child stretching to reach something high

exampleSentences.chinese: 跂而望矣，不如登高。
exampleSentences.english: Standing on tiptoe to look is not as good as climbing to a height.
exampleSentences.usage: Classical literary quote about the limits of tiptoe-standing

exampleSentences.chinese: 踶跂之态难以描述
exampleSentences.english: The appearance of struggling on tiptoe is hard to describe.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古文中踶跂形容用力之状
exampleSentences.english: In classical texts, 踶跂 describes the state of exerting great effort.

exampleSentences.chinese: 此字仅见于踶跂一词
exampleSentences.english: This character appears only in the compound word 踶跂.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他一跃跳过了栅栏
exampleSentences.english: He leaped over the fence in one bound.

exampleSentences.chinese: 鱼儿跃出水面嬉戏
exampleSentences.english: The fish leaped out of the water playfully.

exampleSentences.chinese: 她的心情雀跃不已
exampleSentences.english: Her heart was leaping with joy.

exampleSentences.chinese: 达官贵人出入此地
exampleSentences.english: High-ranking officials and nobles frequent this place.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古代达官享有诸多特权
exampleSentences.english: High-ranking officials in ancient times enjoyed many privileges.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他不攀附达官，清廉自守
exampleSentences.english: He did not curry favor with high officials and maintained his integrity.

exampleSentences.chinese: 该设计具有较强通用性
exampleSentences.english: This design has strong universality.
exampleSentences.usage: Evaluating a product or system design

exampleSentences.chinese: 提高软件的通用性很重要
exampleSentences.english: Improving the universality of software is very important.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这套方法通用性不足
exampleSentences.english: This set of methods lacks sufficient universality.

entries.word: 酒不醉人人自醉，色不迷人人自迷

exampleSentences.chinese: 酒不醉人人自醉，色不迷人人自迷，他终究难逃诱惑
exampleSentences.english: Wine doesn't intoxicate men—men intoxicate themselves; lust doesn't bewitch men—men bewitch themselves. He ultimately could not escape temptation.

exampleSentences.chinese: 古人云酒不醉人人自醉，自制力才是关键
exampleSentences.english: The ancients said men intoxicate themselves; self-control is the key.
exampleSentences.usage: Citing the proverb to emphasize self-discipline

exampleSentences.chinese: 酒不醉人人自醉，凡事要懂得节制
exampleSentences.english: Men intoxicate themselves—one must know moderation in all things.

exampleSentences.chinese: 金针菜炒肉丝味道鲜美
exampleSentences.english: Stir-fried day lily with shredded pork is delicious.

exampleSentences.chinese: 金针菜在中医中有安神功效
exampleSentences.english: Day lily has a calming effect in traditional Chinese medicine.

exampleSentences.chinese: 妈妈买了一把干金针菜
exampleSentences.english: Mom bought a bunch of dried day lily.

exampleSentences.chinese: 木板被钉死在墙上
exampleSentences.english: The wooden board was nailed firmly to the wall.

exampleSentences.chinese: 价格被钉死，无法更改
exampleSentences.english: The price was fixed and could not be changed.
exampleSentences.usage: Metaphorical use meaning something is locked in

exampleSentences.chinese: 他把箱子盖钉死以防散落
exampleSentences.english: He nailed the box lid shut to prevent things from falling out.

exampleSentences.chinese: 考公务员就是为了铁饭碗
exampleSentences.english: Taking the civil service exam is all about securing a stable job.

exampleSentences.chinese: 如今铁饭碗也未必保险
exampleSentences.english: Nowadays, even a so-called iron rice bowl isn't necessarily secure.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他放弃铁饭碗去创业了
exampleSentences.english: He gave up his secure job to start a business.

exampleSentences.chinese: 陆羽著有《茶经》传世
exampleSentences.english: Lu Yu authored 'The Classic of Tea,' which has been passed down through the ages.

exampleSentences.chinese: 陆羽被后人尊为茶圣
exampleSentences.english: Lu Yu was revered by later generations as the Sage of Tea.

exampleSentences.chinese: 陆羽对茶文化影响深远
exampleSentences.english: Lu Yu had a profound influence on tea culture.

exampleSentences.chinese: 农民将玉米秸秆做成青贮
exampleSentences.english: Farmers turn corn stalks into silage.

exampleSentences.chinese: 青贮饲料营养丰富适口性好
exampleSentences.english: Silage is nutritious and highly palatable.
exampleSentences.usage: Discussing the benefits of silage for livestock

exampleSentences.chinese: 冬季牛羊主要靠青贮过冬
exampleSentences.english: In winter, cattle and sheep mainly rely on silage to get through the season.

exampleSentences.chinese: 你去超市顺带买瓶酱油。
exampleSentences.english: While you're at the supermarket, pick up a bottle of soy sauce.
exampleSentences.usage: Making a casual request while someone is already going somewhere

exampleSentences.chinese: 我顺带把文件交给了他。
exampleSentences.english: I handed him the documents while I was at it.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing doing something extra without extra effort

exampleSentences.chinese: 出门顺带把垃圾扔了。
exampleSentences.english: Toss out the trash on your way out.
exampleSentences.usage: Asking someone to do a small task in passing

exampleSentences.chinese: 山间云雾飘渺，如仙境。
exampleSentences.english: Mist drifts faintly through the mountains, like a fairyland.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a misty, ethereal natural scene

exampleSentences.chinese: 她的未来显得虚无飘渺。
exampleSentences.english: Her future seemed vague and uncertain.

exampleSentences.chinese: 远处传来飘渺的歌声。
exampleSentences.english: A faint, distant singing drifted over from afar.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a barely perceptible sound from a distance

exampleSentences.chinese: 风中旗帜迎风飞扬。
exampleSentences.english: The flag soared and fluttered in the wind.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing a flag rising and waving in the wind

exampleSentences.chinese: 她的长发在风中飞扬。
exampleSentences.english: Her long hair flew freely in the wind.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing hair blowing in the breeze

exampleSentences.chinese: 他意气飞扬地走上台。
exampleSentences.english: He walked onto the stage with high spirits.

exampleSentences.chinese: 玫瑰花香馥郁，沁人心脾。
exampleSentences.english: The rose fragrance was rich and deeply refreshing.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the intense scent of flowers

exampleSentences.chinese: 这款香水气味馥郁持久。
exampleSentences.english: This perfume has a rich and long-lasting fragrance.

exampleSentences.chinese: 茶香馥郁，令人陶醉。
exampleSentences.english: The tea's aroma was intensely fragrant and intoxicating.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the strong scent of tea

exampleSentences.chinese: 他点了一份鱼香肉丝盖饭。
exampleSentences.english: He ordered a bowl of rice topped with yuxiang pork strips.
exampleSentences.usage: Ordering a common Chinese dish at a restaurant

exampleSentences.chinese: 鱼香肉丝是川菜的经典菜。
exampleSentences.english: Yuxiang pork strips is a classic Sichuan dish.

exampleSentences.chinese: 妈妈做的鱼香肉丝最好吃。
exampleSentences.english: Mom's yuxiang pork strips taste the best.
exampleSentences.usage: Expressing fondness for a home-cooked version of the dish

exampleSentences.chinese: 她是网红麻豆，粉丝众多。
exampleSentences.english: She is a popular internet model with many fans.

exampleSentences.chinese: 这次活动邀请了几位麻豆。
exampleSentences.english: Several models were invited to this event.
exampleSentences.usage: Referring to models at a fashion or promotional event

exampleSentences.chinese: 他想成为时尚界的麻豆。
exampleSentences.english: He wants to become a model in the fashion industry.

exampleSentences.chinese: 他住在吉林市龙潭区。
exampleSentences.english: He lives in Longtan District of Jilin City.

exampleSentences.chinese: 龙潭区近年发展迅速。
exampleSentences.english: Longtan District has developed rapidly in recent years.
exampleSentences.usage: Discussing urban development of the district

exampleSentences.chinese: 龙潭区有丰富的工业资源。
exampleSentences.english: Longtan District has abundant industrial resources.
exampleSentences.usage: Describing the economic characteristics of the district
